steps.title: Use chronological language
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize the order of two exhibitions. The notes put Wije'wi in 2017 and Ketu'elmita'jik in 2018.

steps.title: Reject nonsequential details
steps.content: B shifts to Bennett's paintings, C lists exhibitions without order, and D gives one date but describes the other vaguely. The sentence needs a clear followed a year later relationship. The answer is A.
